Interface IDatabaseView2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that request database views.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("DADC9333-8622-4B4B-BBAC-A34D7FC49BED")]
public interface IDatabaseView2 : IDatabaseView
